case_title: DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK VS. EDWIN R LAUREANO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 66713070) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREANO, EDWIN R NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-2021
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-20-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66734482)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-20-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
